hooks.command: bash -c 'f="${CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT:-}"; if [[ -z "$f" ]]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$f" == *.py ]]; then ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix --unsafe-fixes "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'cmd="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE "(rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|git clean -f)"; then echo "BLOCKED: destructive operation not allowed" >&2; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'cd /Users/yassin/Documents/smart-contracts-security-copilot && echo "\n=== Session ended: $(date) ===" >> .claude/session-summaries.log; git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null >> .claude/session-summaries.log || true'
